evals.name: init-vue-project
evals.prompt: 我刚创建了一个 Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript 项目，用的 pnpm，还没写任何文档。帮我把文档体系搭起来，先从最重要的开始。
evals.expected_output: Should create CLAUDE.md first, then PRD.md and conventions.md. Should follow progressive documentation principle (Day 0 docs only). Should NOT create architecture.md yet (no code exists). Document structure should match the skill's target structure.

evals.name: audit-existing-docs
evals.prompt: 看看我这个项目的文档情况，哪些需要补充或改进？项目根目录有 README.md 和一个很简短的 CLAUDE.md，docs/ 下面有个 architecture.md 但是好久没更新了。
evals.expected_output: Should enter Audit mode. Should evaluate existing CLAUDE.md for completeness. Should check architecture.md accuracy against codebase. Should recommend missing docs based on project characteristics. Should produce a structured audit report with priority order.

evals.name: add-adr-tech-decision
evals.prompt: 我们团队刚决定从 CSS Modules 迁移到 UnoCSS，帮我记录一下这个技术决策。
evals.expected_output: Should create an ADR in docs/decisions/ directory. Should use the ADR template (Status, Context, Decision, Consequences). Should NOT create a separate '技术选型' document. The ADR should capture why CSS Modules was replaced and the trade-offs of UnoCSS.
